summary: Unit tests comprehensively cover core matrix generation logic (cartesian product, exclude/include rules, maxSize validation, strategy options, features). However, significant gaps undermine overall quality: (1) CLI entry point (generate-matrix.ts) is not tested directly; (2) test fixtures referenced in run-act-tests.ts are missing from provided code; (3) run-act-tests.ts is a standalone script not runnable with `bun test`, violating explicit requirements; (4) error handling and edge cases largely untested (empty dimensions, invalid JSON, type mismatches, null values); (5) unclear test organization—unclear whether all tests actually execute and pass. The workflow structure tests are useful but don't validate end-to-end correctness. Would catch regressions in happy path but miss error conditions and integration failures.
